tools.name: get_weather
tools.description: Get the current weather for a city, returning temperature in Celsius and a short conditions summary.

city.description: The city name to look up, for example 'Paris' or 'Tokyo'.

tools.name: list_reminders
tools.description: List the user's reminders, optionally filtered to a maximum number of results.

limit.description: Maximum number of reminders to return.
